(FEMALE VER. UPLOADED ON MY PAGE)

Time for a road trip! Hit the highway with your nature loving, wilderness obsessed best friend. Ellis is the type who forces you to stop for every scenic look and every cool looking bug. It’s just the two of you, so roll the windows down and turn the music up, because there’s nothing ahead but endless roads stretching across the country. Make sure to make stops to stock up on snacks and find a place to sleep!

Enjoy!🫶❤️
